target_emits.name: create_mac_auth
target_emits.purpose: Create the MAC-auth profile in the Library. Referenced by name from the gateway aaa-profile (authentication.mac-auth).
target_emits.iteration_notes: One POST per source mac_auth_profile record.

target_emits.name: assign_mac_auth
target_emits.purpose: Assign the MAC-auth profile to the target scope. Multi-device-function array packed into a single POST.

config-assignment: {one entry per device_function in target_meta.device_functions: { scope-id, device-function, profile-type='macauth', profile-instance='{name}' }}

target_emits.iteration_notes: One POST; all device-functions share the array.

target_meta.device_function_filtering_rule: MAC-auth profiles back gateway-terminated auth; AOS 8 -> Central migration targets MOBILITY_GW. Referenced by the aaa-profile's authentication.mac-auth.

target_scope_id_resolution.rule: Central scope_id is supplied by the consuming skill at runtime, derived from the AOS 8 mac_auth_profile record's binding scope.
target_scope_id_resolution.input: Source binding scope (string path / identifier); skill-specific

depended_by.relation: the gateway aaa-profile references the MAC-auth profile by name
depended_by.notes: AOS 8 aaa_prof.mac_auth_profile names a mac_auth_profile; the Central aaa-profile's authentication.mac-auth references it. Run mac_auth BEFORE aaa_profile.

objects.notes: REST schema 'mac_auth_profile' (CLI noun: aaa authentication mac). 8 fields; one-level wrapped. case-type / address-format are MAC-formatting enums (mba_case_t / mba_delimiter_t).

case_type.notes: mba_case.mba_case_t (MAC case: upper/lower). NEEDS-PREVIEW: Central case-type enum spelling not yet live-verified.

address_format.notes: mba_fmt.mba_delimiter_t (MAC delimiter format). NEEDS-PREVIEW: Central address-format enum spelling not yet live-verified.

unmapped_fields.reason: Clone is a CLI authoring convenience; _flags are AOS 8-internal metadata (consumer filters inherited/default records).

ignored_variants.reason: Consumer filters _flags.default / _flags.system / _flags.inherited (at definition scope) BEFORE calling emit_calls, matching the rest of the AAA translations.

draft_notes: v1 translation, Gateway-targeted. POST /macauth/{name} then config-assignment to MOBILITY_GW. Simple Paradigm-B via the aos8_mac_auth normalizer.
DEPENDENCY: referenced by central:aaa_profile (authentication.mac-auth) — run mac_auth BEFORE aaa_profile.

NEEDS-PREVIEW: config-assignment profile-type ('macauth') and the case-type / address-format enum spellings — confirm via central_translation_preview against a tenant with a MAC-auth profile configured (the maintainer's dot1x/mac-auth profiles are largely default).
Idempotency: SHARED POST for an existing name returns HTTP 409; consumer handles 409 idempotently.
